purpose: Machine-readable baseline for Codex home structure, native app alignment, and prior cleanup state that must stay current.

md_stale_allowed: procedural runbooks that point to JSON for current facts
json_must_be_current: expected root and cache path sets
hook runtime active and inactive event sets

maintenance_documentation.scope: Root maintenance/*.md plus current maintenance JSON records.
maintenance_documentation.classification_rule: Markdown is principle, rationale, status handoff, template, or historical provenance. Freshness-sensitive operational facts live in JSON and must be regenerated or verified before use.

current_state_json.purpose: Expected Codex home shape, active-source boundaries, official plugin ids, root maintenance Markdown classification, and native alignment criteria.
Latest broad maintenance inventory; use as evidence, not baseline authority.

current_fact_policy.root_md_disposition: Root maintenance Markdown may point to current JSON or verification commands, but must not be used as the only source for current app versions, plugin path existence, enabled runtime state, or active-session tool exposure.
current_fact_policy.status_heading_disposition: Headings such as Current Finding are handoff snapshots unless supported by current JSON or a fresh command.

hook_runtime_state.classification: Session and prompt hooks are active lightweight guardrails. Disabled lifecycle hooks are dormant contract-test surfaces unless intentionally re-enabled.

guardrail_policy.session_start: compact context plus bounded Memento health ensure only; no unrelated repairs
guardrail_policy.user_prompt_submit: prompt secret block plus compact route hints only
guardrail_policy.post_tool_use_if_reenabled: record/remind only; do not run doctor or verify autonomously
guardrail_policy.stop_if_reenabled: ask for missing evidence only; avoid broad final-gate cascades

forbidden_current_patterns: active cross-root skill duplicates without a transition record

repaired_surfaces: toolchains/shims/codex.cmd now prefers the current Store app resource
maintenance scripts no longer use local patched official marketplace copies
check-codex-native-alignment validates enabled configured official bundled plugin paths instead of warning on disabled unconfigured manifest entries
standing subagent authorization is reflected across config, hook policy, workflow reminders, and hook-policy smoke expectations
Codex 5.3 Spark read-only sidecar is standing-authorized across L1-L4 for long or many-file reads without prompt-specific delegation wording
persistent model_reasoning_effort is restored to medium; per-task escalation remains session-local
historical reports with superseded latex or delegation wording are marked as historical instead of current state
hook runtime state now records the intentionally active SessionStart and UserPromptSubmit hooks and inactive lifecycle guard hooks
naming convention checks now block same-name nested directories and active cross-root skill duplicates
duplicate skills/vowline mirror was moved to the Windows Recycle Bin; the primary skill remains under .agents/skills/vowline
